title: ITALY enforcement action against Sole Trader (2,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 2,000 on a sole trader. The controller, who operated a pizza restaurant, had installed a video surveillance system that had been authorised by the authorities. However, the controller operated the system in ways that were not included in the authorisati...
